LanguageData.WULA_TeleportLandingMarker.label: Teleport Landing Marker
LanguageData.WULA_TeleportLandingMarker.description: Used to mark teleport landing locations.
LanguageData.WULA_Prefab_Cleanzone_NewColonyBase_Beac: Wula Prefab Airdrop Beacon - Small Outpost
A beacon for calling in buildings, used to quickly construct a small outpost.
LanguageData.WULA_Prefab_Incoming.label: Wula Empire Building (Incoming)
LanguageData.WULA_Huge_Fortress_Drop_Zone_Beacon_Clea: Wula Prefab Airdrop Beacon - Large Fortress
A beacon for calling in buildings, used to quickly construct a large fortress.
LanguageData.WULA_Bunker_Drop_Zone_Beacon_Cleanzone.d: A beacon for calling in buildings, used to quickly construct a bunker defensive facility.
LanguageData.WULA_Turret_Group_Drop_Zone_Beacon_Clean: Wula Prefab Airdrop Beacon - Turret Group
A beacon for calling in buildings, used to quickly construct a turret group.
LanguageData.WULA_Fortress_Drop_Zone_Beacon_Cleanzone: A beacon for calling in buildings, used to quickly construct a fortress.
LanguageData.WULA_Progressive_Ship_Mid_Beacon_Cleanzo: Wula Empire Medium Assault Escort Ship
Landing zone for a Wula Empire medium assault escort ship.
LanguageData.WULA_Progressive_Ship_Mid_Prefeb_Incomin: Wula Empire Medium Assault Escort Ship (Descending)
LanguageData.WULA_Progressive_Ship_Small_Beacon_Clean: Wula Empire Small Assault Escort Ship
Landing zone for a Wula Empire small assault escort ship.
LanguageData.WULA_Progressive_Ship_Small_Prefeb_Incom: Wula Empire Small Assault Escort Ship (Descending)
LanguageData.WULA_Progressive_Ship_Mini_Beacon_Cleanz: Wula Empire Mini Assault Escort Ship
Landing zone for a Wula Empire mini assault escort ship.
LanguageData.WULA_Progressive_Ship_Mini_Prefeb_Incomi: Wula Empire Mini Assault Escort Ship (Descending)
